ogTitle: Reedy Flat vs Reefton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reedy Flat and Reefton.
heading: Reedy Flat vs Reefton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reedy Flat, Victoria and Reefton, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reedy Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Reefton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Reedy Flat or Reefton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reedy Flat has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Reefton scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reedy Flat scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Reefton scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reedy Flat or Reefton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reedy Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
